name: Olive & Nut Dip
recipeInstructions:
1. Roast the nuts: Preheat your oven to 300°F (150°C). Spread chopped or slivered nuts on a baking sheet and roast for 4-8 minutes, stirring occasionally, until lightly browned and hot. For whole nuts like almonds or hazelnuts, roast at 350°F (175°C) for 6-10 minutes.
2. Combine all ingredients in a food processor and process until smooth.
3. Chill the dip and serve. It will keep refrigerated for up to 3-6 days.
